problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
